overall.description: Gameplay footage from a space simulation game showing first-person cockpit perspective. The player interacts with a holographic navigation interface to plot a course to Baijini Point, then engages quantum drive to travel through space, arriving at a station marked by green lights.

events.description: player clicks SET ROUTE button to plot navigation course to Baijini Point

agents.ego_description: operating the holographic navigation console, selecting destination Baijini Point and confirming the route

entered.detail: 3D holographic projection displaying the planetary system with orbital markers and destination points
large planet or moon surface visible as a bright sphere in the background of the holographic display
transparent interface elements showing SET ROUTE and CLEAR ROUTE options with destination data

segments.scene_description: Inside a spaceship cockpit, the player views a holographic star map interface. The display shows a planetary body with orbital markers. The player selects Baijini Point as the destination and activates the route plotting system.

events.description: exits navigation map mode and returns to forward cockpit viewport view
quantum drive engages, ship accelerates into blue quantum tunnel effect
arriving at destination, green station marker lights become visible ahead

agents.ego_description: piloting the spaceship through quantum travel, monitoring the HUD during high-speed transit to the destination station

entered.detail: structural metal and glass frame of the spaceship cockpit surrounding the viewport
heads-up display showing ship status, speed, and targeting information projected on the canopy
swirling blue energy vortex effect surrounding the ship during faster-than-light travel
green illuminated marker lights of Baijini Point space station appearing in the distance

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts from the navigation map to the cockpit viewport as the ship engages quantum drive. The ship enters a blue quantum tunnel effect with light beams streaming past. As the ship approaches the destination, green marker lights from Baijini Point station become visible ahead against the dark space background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous perspective that transitions from a detailed navigation interface inside a spaceship cockpit to a high-speed journey through deep space. It begins with a focus on a holographic star map where a planetary body and orbital markers are visible as the destination of Baijini Point is selected and the route is plotted. As the navigation is finalized, the perspective shifts forward toward the cockpit viewport just as the ship engages its quantum drive. The environment then transforms into a blue quantum tunnel with light beams streaming past the camera before the tunnel effect fades to reveal the dark void of space. Finally, the scene opens up to show the green marker lights of the Baijini Point station appearing ahead in the distance.
